queries.question: Show the names of both engineering and design courses where either have a project named "Waste Management System".
queries.sql:
SELECT EngineeringClasses.classname
FROM Projects JOIN EngineeringClasses ON Projects.EngineeringClassId = EngineeringClasses.ClassID
WHERE Projects.ProjectName = 'Waste Management System'
UNION
SELECT DesignClasses.classname
FROM Projects JOIN DesignClasses ON Projects.DesignClassId = DesignClasses.ClassID
WHERE Projects.ProjectName = 'Waste Management System'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?projects a :Projects .
    ?engineeringclasses a :EngineeringClasses .
    ?projects p:hasEngineeringClasses ?engineeringclasses .
    ?engineeringclasses p:ClassName ?classname .
    ?projects p:ProjectName ?projectname_f .
    FILTER(STR(?projectname_f) = "Waste Management System")
    BIND(?classname AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?projects a :Projects .
    ?designclasses a :DesignClasses .
    ?projects p:hasDesignClasses ?designclasses .
    ?designclasses p:ClassName ?classname .
    ?projects p:ProjectName ?projectname_f .
    FILTER(STR(?projectname_f) = "Waste Management System")
    BIND(?classname AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Show the names of all engineering classes and the names of design classes which have a project named "Waste Management System".
queries.sql:
SELECT EngineeringClasses.classname
FROM Projects JOIN EngineeringClasses ON Projects.EngineeringClassId = EngineeringClasses.ClassID
UNION
SELECT DesignClasses.classname
FROM Projects JOIN DesignClasses ON Projects.DesignClassId = DesignClasses.ClassID
WHERE Projects.ProjectName = 'Waste Management System'
